title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program developed by Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation to teach AI and machine learning foundations in classrooms. It provides research-backed lessons, videos, worksheets, and teacher training designed for educators without computer science backgrounds, and has reached over 165 countries.
